editor.label: Admin debug
editor.description: Enables debugging for admins

editor.label: Enable API Metrics
editor.description: Enable this to send Metric data to v rising

editor.label: Number of auto saves
editor.description: Number of autosaves to keep

editor.label: Auto Save Interval
editor.description: Interval in seconds between each auto save

editor.label: Day of Reset
editor.description: The day of the week that the wipe will take place.

editor.label: Description
editor.description: Short description of server purpose, rules, message of the day

editor.label: Disable debug events
editor.description: Disables debug events for everyone

editor.label: Game Settings Preset
editor.description:
• Name of a GameSettings preset found in the GameSettingPresets folder
  • Gaming presets can be found in: VRisingServer_Data > StreamingAssets > GameSettingPresets

editor.label: ListOnEOS
editor.description: List Server in the in game browser

editor.label: List server on Steam
editor.description: Displays your server on steam

editor.label: Max concurrent Admins
editor.description: Max number of admins to allow connect even when server is full

editor.label: Server Password
editor.description: Set a password or leave empty

editor.label: Reset Day Interval
editor.description: Number of real-life days before a wipe takes place. (0(ZERO) is disabled)

editor.label: Save Name
editor.description: Name of save file/directory

editor.label: Secure
editor.description: Enables VAC (Valve anti cheat)

editor.label: Server FPS
editor.description: Sets the max number of server frames

editor.label: Enable VOIP
editor.description: VOIP is disabled by default for V Rising
